name: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13x9 inch pan and preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring until smooth. Set aside to cool while beating eggs.
3. Beat eggs, sugar, and vanilla at high speed for 10 minutes.
4. Blend in the melted chocolate-butter mixture at low speed.
5. Add flour, blending just to combine.
6. Stir in walnuts if desired.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out slightly dirty.
8. Allow brownies to cool in pan before cutting into squares.
Rating:
Difficulty: easy to moderate
Time: 30 minutes preparation, 1 hour cooking and cooling
Precision: measure ingredients
